mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM table_example_standard a, (SELECT id FROM table_example_standard ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) b WHERE a.id = b.id
SELECT a.* FROM table_example_standard a, (SELECT id FROM table_example_standard WHERE field_one = 1 AND delete_time = 0 LIMIT 10) b WHERE a.id = b.id

SELECT a.*, b.field_four, b.field_five, b.field_six, c.field_seven FROM delete_time_query_1 a INNER JOIN delete_time_query_2 b ON a.uk = b.uk INNER JOIN delete_time_query_4 c ON a.uk = c.uk WHERE a.field_one IS NOT NULL

SELECT a.uk, a.field_one, b.field_four, d.other_field FROM delete_time_query_1 a LEFT JOIN delete_time_query_2 b ON a.uk = b.uk RIGHT JOIN no_tenant_no_delete d ON a.uk = d.uk WHERE b.field_five IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM delete_time_query_1 a WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM delete_time_query_2 b WHERE b.uk = a.uk AND b.field_five = '55' )
SELECT uk, field_one FROM delete_time_query_1 WHERE delete_time = 0 UNION ALL SELECT uk, field_four FROM delete_time_query_2 WHERE delete_time = 0

SELECT a.uk, a.field_one, b.field_four, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_time_query_4 c WHERE c.uk = a.uk) as cnt FROM delete_time_query_1 a INNER JOIN delete_time_query_2 b ON a.uk = b.uk WHERE a.field_two = '2'
SELECT a.uk, b.uk, d.other_field FROM delete_time_query_1 a CROSS JOIN delete_time_query_2 b CROSS JOIN no_tenant_no_delete d WHERE a.uk = b.uk AND b.uk = d.uk

SELECT a.id AS a_id, a.uk AS a_uk, a.field_one, b.id AS b_id, b.field_four, c.id AS c_id, c.field_seven, d.id AS d_id, d.other_field FROM delete_time_query_1 a LEFT JOIN delete_time_query_2 b ON a.uk = b.uk LEFT JOIN delete_time_query_4 c ON a.uk = c.uk AND c.tenant_co = 'co' LEFT JOIN no_tenant_no_delete d ON a.uk = d.uk WHERE a.field_one IS NOT NULL AND (b.field_five IS NULL OR b.field_five != 'forbidden') ORDER BY a.id, b.id, c.id, d.id LIMIT 10;
